title: Shagird
actors: Joy Mukherjee, Saira Banu, I.S. Johar
plot: Professor Brijmohan Agnihotri hates women, love and institution of marriage. He advises his pupil Rajesh to not fall in love or get married. Rajesh blindly follows professor until one fine day he confronts Poonam. Poonam's guardia...
